steps: Visit CityEase and search Birth Certificate or click Municipal Services.
Fill the online application form with child and parent details.
Upload scanned copies of required documents (PDF or JPG, max 2MB each).
Pay the fee online via UPI or Net Banking if birth is after 21 days.
Receive application reference number via SMS or Email.
Track status — certificate delivered by post or available for download.
name: Birth Certificate
description: Apply for official birth certificate from municipal corporation.

steps: Click Utility Payments from the services menu.
Select Electricity and choose your provider (MSEDCL, DGVCL, PGVCL etc.).
Enter your Consumer Number from your electricity bill.
View outstanding amount, due date, and bill history.
Click Pay and choose UPI, Debit/Credit Card, or Net Banking.
Download receipt instantly — payment reflects within 24 hours.
name: Electricity Bill Payment
description: Pay your electricity bill online instantly from home.

steps: Go to Utility Payments and select Water.
Select your municipality such as PCMC, AMC or VMC.
Enter your Water Account Number.
View bill and pay via UPI or Card.
Receive SMS confirmation.
name: Water Bill Payment
description: Pay municipal water supply bills online quickly.

steps: Visit nfsa.gov.in or the state food portal.
Select Apply for New Ration Card.
Fill family details — head of household, members, income.
Upload Aadhaar, address proof, and family photo.
Submit and note the application number.
Inspector visits for verification.
Card issued and delivered within 30 days.
name: Ration Card
description: Apply for new ration card or make changes to existing one.

steps: Search for your route using From and To fields.
View all available buses, timings, and number of stops.
For monthly pass click Apply for Pass and fill the form.
Upload photo and ID proof.
Pay online and collect pass from nearest depot.
name: Bus Routes and Pass
description: Find bus routes, track live bus locations, and apply for travel passes.

steps: Search for hospital near me or use the Location Map.
Select hospital and choose department General or Specialist.
Pick available date and time slot for OPD.
Enter Aadhaar number for verification.
Receive appointment confirmation via SMS.
Arrive 15 minutes before appointment with Aadhaar and confirmation.
name: Government Hospital
description: Find nearest government hospitals and book OPD appointments.

documents: Proof of updated info (new address or utility bill)
steps: Visit myaadhaar.uidai.gov.in.
Login with existing Aadhaar number and OTP.
Select Update Aadhaar and choose what to update.
Upload supporting proof document.
Pay ₹50 via UPI or Card.
Note Service Request Number (SRN).
Updated Aadhaar available for download in 7–14 days.
name: Aadhaar Card Update
description: Update address, mobile number, or name on your Aadhaar card.

steps: Select Property Tax from Municipal Services.
Enter your property account number.
View outstanding dues and history.
Select amount and pay via UPI or Card.
Download receipt with unique transaction ID.
name: Property Tax Payment
description: Pay municipal property tax online and view payment history.

cost: Free to apply / Subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh
steps: Check eligibility — income below ₹3L/6L/12L/18L per category.
Visit pmaymis.gov.in or nearest CSC.
Fill application form with family and income details.
Attach all required documents.
Application reviewed by block/district authority.
If approved, subsidy directly credited to bank account.
name: PM Awas Yojana
description: Apply for housing assistance under PM Awas Yojana scheme.

documents: Metro card number or Mobile number
steps: Select Metro Card Recharge from Transport services.
Enter your 10-digit metro card number.
Choose recharge amount or select monthly pass.
Pay via UPI, Card, or Net Banking.
Recharge reflects within 15 minutes.
name: Metro Card and Pass
description: Recharge metro card, apply for monthly or quarterly pass online.
